Bash(cd "D:\\projects\\Gen-AI\\Nexus Learner" && python -c "
from duckduckgo_search import DDGS
ddgs = DDGS\(\)
try:
    r = ddgs.text\('binary search tree data structures', max_results=10\)
    print\('Results count:', len\(r or []\)\)
    for i in r or []:
        print\(' -', i.get\('href', i.get\('url',''\)\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('ERROR:', e\)
")

Bash(cd "D:\\projects\\Gen-AI\\Nexus Learner" && pip install ddgs 2>&1 | tail -5 && python -c "
from ddgs import DDGS
ddgs = DDGS\(\)
r = ddgs.text\('binary search tree tutorial', max_results=10\)
print\('Results:', len\(r or []\)\)
for i in \(r or []\)[:3]:
    print\(' -', i.get\('href',''\)\)
")

Bash(cd "D:\\projects\\Gen-AI\\Nexus Learner" && python -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from agents.web_researcher import WebResearchAgent
agent = WebResearchAgent\(\)
def cb\(msg\): print\(msg\)
docs = agent.research_topics\(
    topics=['Binary Search Trees'],
    subject_name='Data Structures',
    subject_id=999,
    status_callback=cb,
\)
print\(f'RESULT: {len\(docs\)} document\(s\) found'\)
for d in docs:
    print\(f'  [{d.domain}] {d.title} - {len\(d.content\)} chars'\)
" 2>&1)
